queries.sql: SELECT A.SEQ, A.ESTATECODE, A.DIVISIONCODE AFD, SUM (C.TOTAL_JANJANG_PANEN) TOTAL_JANJANG, SUM (C.BUAH_MASAK) BUAH_MASAK, SUM (C.BUAH_LEWAT_MASAK) LEWAT_MASAK, SUM (C.BUAH_MENTAH) BUAH_MENTAH, SUM (C.TOTAL_JANJANG_PANEN*BJR) TON, SUM (C.BRONDOLAN) BRONDOLAN, TO_CHAR(DECODE(SUM (C.TOTAL_JANJANG_PANEN*BJR),0,0,SUM (C.BRONDOLAN) / SUM (C.TOTAL_JANJANG_PANEN*BJR)) * 100,'99.99') PCT_BRD FROM FIELD_ALL A, FIELDCROP B, MASTERHASILEDIT C, AVERAGEBUNCHWEIGHT D WHERE A.DIVISIONCODE = B.DIVISIONCODE AND b.fieldcode = c.fieldcode AND comp = 'SMG' AND a.year = 2024 AND TO_CHAR (TO_DATE ('11/15/2024', 'MM/DD/YYYY'), 'MMYYYY') = case when d.month = 12 then lpad(1,2,'0')||(d.year+1) else lpad(d.month+1,2,'0')||d.year end and c.fieldcode = d.fieldcode AND TO_DATE (C.TDATE, 'ddmmyyyy') between TO_DATE ('11/15/2024', 'MM/DD/YYYY') and TO_DATE ('11/15/2024', 'MM/DD/YYYY') GROUP BY a.estatecode, A.DIVISIONCODE, a.seq order by a.estatecode,a.seq

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT A.SEQ, A.ESTATECODE, A.DIVISIONCODE AFD, SUM (C.TOTAL_JANJANG_PANEN) TOTAL_JANJANG, SUM (C.BUAH_MASAK) BUAH_MASAK, SUM (C.BUAH_LEWAT_MASAK) LEWAT_MASAK, SUM (C.BUAH_MENTAH) BUAH_MENTAH, SUM (C.TOTAL_JANJANG_PANEN*BJR) TON, SUM (C.BRONDOLAN) BRONDOLAN, TO_CHAR(DECODE(SUM (C.TOTAL_JANJANG_PANEN*BJR),0,0,SUM (C.BRONDOLAN) / SUM (C.TOTAL_JANJANG_PANEN*BJR)) * 100,'99.99') PCT_BRD FROM FIELD_ALL A, FIELDCROP B, MASTERHASILEDIT C, AVERAGEBUNCHWEIGHT D WHERE A.DIVISIONCODE = B.DIVISIONCODE AND b.fieldcode = c.fieldcode AND comp = 'SMG' AND a.year = 2024 AND TO_CHAR (TO_DATE ('11/15/2024', 'MM/DD/YYYY'), 'MMYYYY') = case when d.month = 12 then lpad(1,2,'0')||(d.year+1) else lpad(d.month+1,2,'0')||d.year end and c.fieldcode = d.fieldcode AND TO_DATE (C.TDATE, 'ddmmyyyy') between TO_DATE ('11/15/2024', 'MM/DD/YYYY') and TO_DATE ('11/15/2024', 'MM/DD/YYYY') GROUP BY a.estatecode, A.DIVISIONCODE, a.seq order by a.estatecode,a.seq
